definitions.text: An act of exchanging or trading.
examples: All in all, it was an even exchange.
an exchange of cattle for grain
The stock exchange is open for trading.
The old corn exchange has been converted into a music venue.
I'll gladly exchange my place for yours.

definitions.text: To mutually direct at each other.
examples: The opposing soldiers exchanged fire across the burning streets.

definitions.text: To replace with, as a substitute.
examples: I'd like to exchange this shirt for one in a larger size.
Since his arrest, the mob boss has exchanged a mansion for a jail cell.
